label: default agent • cancel an in-flight model download
query: Cancel the download for the model mlx-community/Some-Big-Model-32B-4bit.
notes: action 'cancel' for an in-flight download. Cancel is a no-op for a model that isn't downloading; the assertion pins the ACTION (cancel, not delete/download) because that is the discrimination under test. It does NOT pin the identifier field: osaurus_model identifies a model for cancel/delete by either `id` or `repo_id` (a download keyed by repo path makes `model.id == repo_id`), so a model may pass the user's repo path in `repo_id` (anthropic) or the name in `id` (grok) and both are correct. Pinning one field made a correct repo_id cancel fail spuriously.
